overview.description: Admon (Ad Monetisation) is NoonFood's CPC-based paid listing and keyword search product that allows restaurant partners to bid for premium placement on different assets of our app. Campaigns are configured with a restaurant / brand, total budget, bid strategy, and campaign duration. Performance is tracked daily via spend, clicks, bid, GMV, and orders.

glossary.Admon: Ad Monetisation — NoonFood's paid restaurant listing/placement product.
glossary.CPC: Cost Per Click — total_spent divided by total_clicks for a campaign.
glossary.Effective Bid: Revenue divided by clicks for a given day. Formula: SAFE_DIVIDE(revenue, clicks). Represents realised value per click, not the set bid.
glossary.ROI: Return on Investment — GMV divided by total spend. Formula: SAFE_DIVIDE(gmv, total_spent). Higher is better.
glossary.Budget: Original total campaign budget allocated by the restaurant.
glossary.Updatedbudget: Budget after any modifications. Always use Updatedbudget (not budget) for financial and churn analysis. Exclude rows where Updatedbudget = 0.
glossary.Budgetperday: Daily budget = budget / UpdatedCampaigndays. Pre-computed column in admon_info.
glossary.SpentPercent: Percentage of total budget consumed so far. Formula: total_spent / Budget * 100.
glossary.TimePercent: Percentage of campaign duration elapsed. Formula: days_elapsed / total_campaign_days * 100.
glossary.spend_status: Health label comparing SpentPercent vs TimePercent. Actual column values are granular — use LIKE patterns in SQL: underspending → LIKE 'underspend%', overspending → LIKE 'overspend%', expired on target → 'expired_ontarget', expired underspent → 'expired_underspent'. NEVER filter with simplified labels like 'underspending' or 'overspending' directly — they do not exist in the column.
glossary.RevenueLoss: Estimated revenue lost due to underspending relative to expected pace.
glossary.status_code: Approval/lifecycle status stored in admon_info. Used in churn analysis and campaign filtering alongside campaign_status.
glossary.is_free_campaign: Integer flag (0/1) or NULL. Paid campaign filter: (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL). NULL should always be treated as paid.
glossary.auto_bid: CRITICAL: Stored as STRING ('true'/'false') in admon_info — NOT a boolean. Always cast with: IF(auto_bid = 'true', 1, 0). Never treat directly as boolean.
glossary.is_live: Binary flag — campaign is currently active and serving impressions.
glossary.is_canceled: Binary flag — campaign was manually cancelled before end date.
glossary.Campaigndays: Total planned duration of the campaign in days.
glossary.UpdatedCampaigndays: Recalculated campaign days after budget top-ups. Always prefer this over Campaigndays.
glossary.MTDdays: Month-to-date days elapsed since campaign start or month start.
glossary.impressions: Total number of times the ad was shown to users.
glossary.distinct_impressions: Count of unique users who saw the ad.
glossary.bid: The CPC bid amount set by the partner or auto-computed.
glossary.gmv: Gross Merchandise Value — total order value attributed to the ad campaign.
glossary.comm_gmv: Commissioned GMV — the share of GMV on which NoonFood earns commission.
glossary.new_customers: New customers who ordered via the campaign (first-time buyers at this outlet).
glossary.repeat_customers: Returning customers who reordered via the campaign.
glossary.am: Account Manager — the NoonFood team member managing the partner account.
glossary.Churn: A restaurant is churned if its campaign ended and NO new admon campaign was found in admon_daily for that rcode within 31 days after end_at. Detected by: COUNT(DISTINCT ad_code) FROM admon_daily WHERE day BETWEEN end_at+1 AND end_at+31 AND rcode = <rcode> = 0.

noonbifood.sales.admon_info.description: Campaign-level snapshot table. One row per campaign (code). Contains campaign configuration, budget tracking, spend health, and aggregated performance metrics.
noonbifood.sales.admon_info.grain: One row per ad campaign (code = ad_code)
noonbifood.sales.admon_info.partition: NONE — do not add a day filter. Filter by country_code, campaign_status, or date columns (start_at, end_at) directly.

key_columns.restaurant_name: Name of the restaurant running the ad [STRING]
key_columns.creation_date: Date the ad campaign was created [DATE]
key_columns.country_code: Country where the campaign runs (e.g. ae) [STRING]
key_columns.currency_code: Currency of the campaign budget (e.g. AED) [STRING]
key_columns.status_code: Approval status of the campaign (e.g. approved) [STRING]
key_columns.is_active: Whether the ad is currently active [INTEGER]
key_columns.is_active_version: Whether this is the active version of the ad [INTEGER]
key_columns.outlets: List of outlet codes the campaign applies to [STRING]
key_columns.total_clicks: Total clicks received by the campaign [INTEGER]
key_columns.Clicks_target: Target click count for the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.is_live: Whether the campaign is currently live [INTEGER]
key_columns.campaign_status: Current status label of the campaign (e.g. to_be_started,live,canceled,finished) [STRING]
key_columns.is_canceled: Whether the campaign has been canceled [INTEGER]
key_columns.Spendperday: Calculated spend per day based on budget and days [FLOAT]
key_columns.Campaigndays: Total duration of the campaign in days [INTEGER]
key_columns.cancelled_date: Date the campaign was canceled, if applicable [DATE]
key_columns.CampaigndaysforCancelled: Effective campaign days accounting for cancellation [FLOAT]
key_columns.parent_ad: Parent ad ID if this is a child campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.is_free_campaign: Whether this is a free/complimentary campaign [INTEGER]
key_columns.auto_bid: Whether auto-bidding is enabled [STRING — values: 'true' or 'false', NOT a boolean. Always cast: IF(auto_bid = 'true', 1, 0). Never compare directly as boolean.]
key_columns.is_successful_topup: Whether the last top-up was successful [BOOLEAN]
key_columns.is_topup_triggered: Whether a top-up has been triggered [BOOLEAN]
key_columns.Updatedbudget: Budget after any top-ups or updates [FLOAT]
key_columns.UpdatedCampaigndays: Campaign days recalculated after budget updates [INTEGER]
key_columns.Budgetperday: Daily budget derived from updated budget and days [FLOAT]
key_columns.SpentPercent: Percentage of budget spent so far [FLOAT]
key_columns.spend_status: Spend health label relative to time progress (e.g. overspend_10below,underspend_10below,overspend_10,underspend_10,overspend_30,underspend_20,overspend_20,overspend_40plus,underspend_30,underspend_40below,expired_ontarget,expired_underspent) [STRING]
key_columns.orders: Number of orders attributed to the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.gmv: Gross merchandise value attributed to the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.new_customers: New customers acquired via the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.bid: Bid amount set for the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.City: City where the campaign is running [STRING]
key_columns.impressions: Total impressions served by the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.distinct_impressions: Distinct/unique impressions served by distinct customers[FLOAT]

noonbifood.sales.admon_daily.description: Day-level performance table. One row per campaign per day. Use for daily spend, pacing, and effective bid analysis.
noonbifood.sales.admon_daily.grain: One row per ad_code per day

key_columns.day: Date of the ad performance record [DATE]
key_columns.country: Country code where the campaign ran (e.g. ae) [STRING]
key_columns.Budget: Daily budget allocated for the campaign [FLOAT]
key_columns.revenue: Revenue attributed to the campaign on that day [FLOAT]
key_columns.clicks: Number of clicks received on that day [INTEGER]
key_columns.week: ISO week number of the record [INTEGER]
key_columns.month: Month start date of the record [DATE]
key_columns.am: Account manager name responsible for the campaign [STRING]
key_columns.is_free_campaign: Whether this is a free/complimentary campaign (0/1) [INTEGER]
key_columns.bid: Bid amount used on that day [FLOAT]

ROI.definition: Return on Investment for an admon campaign.

effective_bid.definition: Actual revenue delivered per click on a given day.
effective_bid.notes: This is the realised value vs the partner's set bid amount.

spend_pacing.definition: How well campaign spend tracks against elapsed time.
spend_pacing.logic: If SpentPercent < TimePercent → underspending. If SpentPercent > TimePercent → overspending.

spend_status_values.underspend group (use: spend_status LIKE: underspend_10below, underspend_10, underspend_20, underspend_30, underspend_40below — SpentPercent significantly < TimePercent
spend_status_values.overspend group (use: spend_status LIKE: overspend_10below, overspend_10, overspend_20, overspend_30, overspend_40plus — SpentPercent significantly > TimePercent
spend_status_values.expired_ontarget: Campaign ended on budget — use spend_status = 'expired_ontarget'
spend_status_values.CRITICAL: Never use spend_status = 'underspending' or = 'overspending' — these values do not exist in the column and will return 0 rows.

churn.definition: Campaign ended with no renewal within 31 days after end_at.
churn.formula: Correlated subquery: COUNT(DISTINCT ad_code) FROM admon_daily WHERE day BETWEEN end_at+1 AND end_at+31 AND rcode = ai.rcode. If = 0 → churned.
churn.standard_filters: Updatedbudget > 0, country_code = 'ae', ad_type = 'listing', (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL)

statuses.to_be_started: Approved and scheduled — start_at is in the future.
statuses.live: Currently active — is_live = 1, within start_at/end_at window.
statuses.finished: Ran full duration — end_at has passed.

sql_rules.table_join: JOIN admon_daily TO admon_info on: admon_daily.ad_code = admon_info.code
sql_rules.country_column_naming: admon_info → country_code. admon_daily → country. Both are lowercase strings (e.g. 'ae', 'sa'). Never mix these column names across tables.

partition_rules.admon_info: NO partition — no day filter needed. Filter on start_at or end_at if date scoping is required.

sql_rules.week_derivation: Always use date_trunc(day, week(Monday)) — not ISO week number field.
sql_rules.auto_bid_cast: auto_bid is STRING in admon_info. Cast as IF(auto_bid = 'true', 1, 0). Do not use directly as boolean.
sql_rules.paid_campaign_filter: To get paid campaigns: WHERE (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL). NULL = paid.
sql_rules.budget_exclusion: Always add AND Updatedbudget > 0 in financial and churn queries on admon_info.
sql_rules.listing_filter: Standard analyses add AND ad_type = 'listing' to focus on core campaigns.
sql_rules.churn_date_arithmetic: Date arithmetic uses DATE + integer: end_at + 1, end_at + 31. BigQuery supports this directly on DATE columns.
sql_rules.looker_date_params: @DS_START_DATE and @DS_END_DATE are passed as STRING 'YYYYMMDD'. Parse with PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', @DS_START_DATE).
sql_rules.divide_by_zero: Always use SAFE_DIVIDE(a, b) or NULLIF(col, 0) in all denominators — clicks and spend can be 0.
sql_rules.admon_summary_select: SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc(day, week(Monday)) as Week, date_trunc(day, month) as month, * except(Free_Planned_click), Free_Planned_click as Free_planned_click FROM noonbifood.growthv1.admon_daily_summary

example_queries.question: Base daily admon performance with campaign metadata — last 6 months
example_queries.sql: SELECT date_trunc(day, month) as month, date_trunc(day, week(Monday)) as week, day, ad_code, ad.ad_type, a.rcode, rname, country as country_code, a.Budget, revenue, clicks, year, a.am, a.idpo, a.City, (CASE WHEN ad.is_free_campaign = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as is_free_campaign, IF(ad.auto_bid = 'true', 1, 0) as auto_bid FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_daily AS a LEFT JOIN noonbifood.sales.admon_info ad ON a.ad_code = ad.code WHERE date_trunc(a.day, month) > date_trunc(current_date - 180, month) AND day < current_date

example_queries.question: Overview table from admon_daily_summary
example_queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc(day, week(Monday)) as Week, date_trunc(day, month) as month, * except(Free_Planned_click), Free_Planned_click as Free_planned_click FROM noonbifood.growthv1.admon_daily_summary

example_queries.question: Churned restaurants — campaigns that ended with no renewal within 31 days (UAE paid listing)
example_queries.sql: SELECT *, date_trunc(start_at, month) as month, date_trunc(end_at + 1, month) as end_month FROM (SELECT ai.start_at, ai.end_at, ai.rcode, ai.code as ad_code, ai.restaurant_name, ai.status_code, ai.budget, ai.Updatedbudget, ai.am, ai.City, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ad_code) FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_daily AS a WHERE a.day BETWEEN ai.end_at + 1 AND ai.end_at + 31 AND a.rcode = ai.rcode) AS start_at_feb, orders, gmv, total_spent FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_info AS ai WHERE end_at BETWEEN PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', @DS_START_DATE) AND PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', @DS_END_DATE) AND Updatedbudget > 0 AND ai.country_code = 'ae' AND ai.ad_type = 'listing' AND (ai.is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL)) vw1 WHERE start_at_feb = 0

example_queries.question: Live campaigns in UAE with ROI and spend status
example_queries.sql: SELECT restaurant_name, code, Updatedbudget, total_spent, gmv, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(gmv, total_spent), 2) AS roi, SpentPercent, TimePercent, spend_status FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_info WHERE country_code = 'ae' AND campaign_status = 'live' AND ad_type = 'listing' AND (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL) AND Updatedbudget > 0 ORDER BY roi DESC

example_queries.question: Average CPC for paid listing campaigns in UAE
example_queries.sql: SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(total_spent), SUM(total_clicks)), 3) AS avg_cpc FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_info WHERE country_code = 'ae' AND campaign_status = 'live' AND ad_type = 'listing' AND (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL)

example_queries.question: Daily effective bid for a campaign over last 30 days
example_queries.sql: SELECT day, ad_code, rname, clicks, revenue, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(revenue, clicks), 3) AS effective_bid, Budget FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_daily WHERE day >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND country = 'ae' AND ad_code = '<AD_CODE>' ORDER BY day DESC

example_queries.question: Underspending campaigns in UAE
example_queries.sql: SELECT restaurant_name, code, Updatedbudget, total_spent, SpentPercent, TimePercent, RevenueLoss FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_info WHERE country_code = 'ae' AND campaign_status = 'live' AND spend_status LIKE 'underspend%' AND ad_type = 'listing' AND (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL) AND Updatedbudget > 0 ORDER BY RevenueLoss DESC

example_queries.question: AM-wise admon GMV and ROI for UAE
example_queries.sql: SELECT am, COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS campaigns, SUM(Updatedbudget) AS total_budget, SUM(total_spent) AS total_spent, SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(gmv), SUM(total_spent)), 2) AS roi FROM noonbifood.sales.admon_info WHERE country_code = 'ae' AND ad_type = 'listing' AND Updatedbudget > 0 AND (is_free_campaign = 0 OR is_free_campaign IS NULL) GROUP BY am ORDER BY total_gmv DESC
